store.name: The Skin Stockist
store.note: Set stripeLink per product to enable checkout. Empty stripeLink falls back to email ordering.

products.name: Cleansing Complex
products.how: Massage a small amount over damp skin morning and night, then rinse. Follow with treatment serum.
products.desc: A clear gel cleanser that removes makeup, oil and surface buildup without stripping the skin. Gentle resurfacing ingredients keep pores clear and prep skin so the treatments that follow absorb properly.

products.name: Cream Cleanser
products.how: Massage onto dry or damp skin, then rinse or remove with a warm cloth. Suitable for morning and night.
products.desc: A rich, non-foaming cream cleanser for skin that finds gel formulas drying. Lifts away makeup and debris while leaving a soft, cushioned finish rather than a tight one.

products.name: Warming Honey Cleanser
products.how: Warm a small amount between palms, massage onto dry face, then rinse with warm water.
products.desc: A honey-based cleanser that warms gently on contact and rinses clean without any residue. The comfortable choice for dry or easily irritated skin that finds gel cleansers too harsh.

products.name: Cleansing Complex Polish
products.how: Massage over damp skin in circular motions for 30-60 seconds, then rinse. Use 2-3 times weekly in place of your regular cleanser.
products.desc: A cleansing scrub that combines physical polish with gentle acid resurfacing. Leaves skin visibly smoother without the grit of a standard exfoliant.

products.name: Active Peel System
products.skin: All skin types; use 1-2x per week
products.how: Wipe step one over clean skin, wait one minute, follow with step two. Leave on or rinse after 3-5 minutes depending on tolerance.
products.desc: A two-step at-home peel in pre-dosed towelette sets. Step one exfoliates, step two neutralizes and treats. Fifteen sets per box — a weekly professional-style treatment without the appointment.

products.name: Tri-Active Exfoliating Masque
products.how: Apply an even layer to clean, dry skin. Leave on 10-15 minutes, then rinse thoroughly. Use once or twice weekly.
products.desc: A mask that layers enzyme exfoliation over a salicylic base, so it lifts congestion and dulling buildup at the same time. Rinses clean with no residue.

products.name: Lip Polish
products.how: Massage onto damp or wet lips in circular motions, then rinse or wipe away. Use 2-3 times weekly.
products.desc: A sugar-based lip scrub that buffs away flaking without the raw feeling of a DIY scrub. Leaves lips soft enough for balm or color to sit properly.

products.name: Active Serum
products.skin: All skin types; start 2-3 nights per week
products.how: Apply 3-4 drops to clean skin at night, building up from a few nights a week to nightly as tolerated. Always follow with SPF the next morning.
products.desc: The one most people start with. A fast-acting resurfacing serum that works on fine lines, uneven tone and breakouts at the same time. Expect a brief tingle on application — that is the formula working, and it settles within a minute.

products.name: Pro-Heal Serum Advance+
products.how: Apply 3-4 drops to clean skin morning or night, alone or under a moisturizer.
products.desc: A stable vitamin C serum built for skin that needs calming as much as correcting. Strong antioxidant protection with ingredients chosen to settle redness and support healing.

products.name: Super Serum Advance+
products.how: Apply 3-4 drops to clean skin morning or night. Can be layered under Active Serum on alternating nights.
products.desc: Vitamin C paired with a copper peptide — a combination aimed at skin repair. The pick for softening the look of scars, stretch marks and established lines while defending against daily oxidative stress.

products.name: Brightening Serum
products.how: Apply 3-4 drops to clean skin, focusing on areas of pigmentation. A brief tingling sensation is normal.
products.desc: A targeted serum for dark spots and blotchy tone that pairs botanical brighteners with a light acid base, so discoloration fades without the harshness of a straight hydroquinone approach.

products.name: Brightening Complex
products.how: Apply a thin layer to clean skin morning or night as your primary treatment step.
products.desc: A richer, cream-based counterpart to Brightening Serum for skin that wants tone correction with more cushion and less potential for dryness.

products.name: Youth Complex
products.how: Apply a small amount to clean skin, smoothing evenly over face and neck.
products.desc: A firming treatment built around a copper peptide known for supporting skin's own repair processes, paired with a light acid blend so texture improves alongside tone.

products.name: Youth Serum
products.how: Apply 1-2 drops to the palm, then dab and smooth around the eyes, face and neck.
products.desc: A lightweight, fast-absorbing serum version of the brand's firming technology, formulated to layer easily under other actives without pilling.

products.name: GeneXC Serum
products.skin: All skin types, environmentally stressed skin
products.how: Apply 3-4 drops to clean skin each morning before SPF.
products.desc: A vitamin C serum layered with an antioxidant enzyme complex, built as a daytime defense step for skin that deals with regular sun and pollution exposure.

products.name: Poly-Vitamin Serum
products.how: Apply 3-4 drops to clean skin morning or night, alone or under moisturizer.
products.desc: A multivitamin serum for skin that wants broad support rather than one targeted concern — hydration, antioxidants and gentle renewal in a single lightweight step.

products.name: Retinol+ Emulsion 0.3
products.skin: Normal to resilient skin; night use
products.how: Apply a pea-sized amount to clean, dry skin at night, starting 2-3 nights per week.
products.desc: A retinol treatment buffered with bakuchiol so you get the smoothing and brightening without the usual flaking phase. Applied at night, a pea-sized amount covers the full face.

products.name: Firming Complex
products.how: Apply a small amount to clean skin on the neck and décolleté, morning or night.
products.desc: A firming treatment sized and formulated for the neck and chest, where skin is thinner and shows laxity earlier than the face.

products.name: NeckPerfect Complex
products.how: Apply a small amount to clean skin, smoothing evenly over the neck and décolleté.
products.desc: A tightening treatment aimed specifically at jawline and neck definition, formulated to layer under Firming Complex or worn on its own.

products.name: Hydra-Cool Serum
products.skin: All skin types, including oily and sensitive
products.how: Apply 3-4 drops to clean skin, layer under any moisturizer, or keep chilled for an extra cooling effect.
products.desc: An oil-free hydrating serum with a signature cooling feel on application. Layers under any moisturizer, calms heat and irritation, and gives oily skin water-based hydration without weight.

products.name: Reparative Moisture Emulsion
products.how: Apply morning and night as the final step, or whenever the barrier needs extra support.
products.desc: A rebuilding moisturizer for skin whose barrier needs help — post-retinol, post-procedure or seasonally stressed. Restores comfort and holds hydration through the day.

products.name: Moisturizing Complex
products.how: Apply morning and night as the final step in your routine.
products.desc: The everyday moisturizer of the line. Antioxidant-rich, comfortable under sunscreen or makeup, and balanced enough that combination skin can wear it morning and night.

products.name: Daily Dynamic Hydrator
products.skin: All skin types; AM and PM
products.how: Apply morning and night after treatment serums, before SPF during the day.
products.desc: The newest hydrator in the range — a daily cream that pairs lasting hydration with environmental defense and gentle renewal, designed to carry a routine on its own on light days.

products.name: Youth Intensive Crème
products.how: Apply morning and night as the final step, focusing on areas of concern.
products.desc: The most concentrated cream in the line. A rich, fast-absorbing formula focused on firmness and deep hydration for skin that has moved past prevention and wants correction.

products.name: Copper Firming Mist
products.how: Close eyes and mist liberally over face and neck any time skin needs a refresh, over or under makeup.
products.desc: A fine facial mist for a mid-day hydration boost or to set makeup, with copper and resveratrol carried in for a small firming benefit beyond plain water.

products.name: Eclipse SPF 50+
products.how: Apply liberally as the last step each morning, 15 minutes before sun exposure. Reapply every two hours outdoors.
products.desc: A mineral sunscreen that actually disappears. Broad-spectrum SPF 50+ in an ultra-sheer base that wears comfortably every day and never chalks — the non-negotiable final step of any routine built around active treatments.

products.name: Extreme Protect SPF 30
products.how: Apply liberally 15 minutes before sun exposure. Reapply at least every two hours.
products.desc: A hybrid sunscreen-treatment that adds antioxidant and repair-support ingredients to standard broad-spectrum protection, for skin that wants SPF to do more than block UV.

products.name: Extreme Protect SPF 40
products.how: Apply liberally 15 minutes before sun exposure. Reapply at least every two hours, more often if swimming or sweating.
products.desc: An all-physical, higher-SPF mineral sunscreen for skin that reacts to chemical filters, still built on the brand's antioxidant base rather than a plain block.

products.name: Youth Eye Complex
products.skin: All skin types; AM and PM
products.how: Pat a small amount around the orbital bone morning and night, avoiding direct contact with the eye.
products.desc: A dual-action eye treatment that hydrates immediately and works on fine lines over time. Light enough for morning use under concealer, active enough to be the night treatment too.

products.name: Eye Complex
products.how: Pat a small amount around the eye area morning and night.
products.desc: A botanical eye cream aimed specifically at puffiness and dark circles rather than fine lines, for mornings when the eye area needs a visible reset.

products.name: GeneXC Firming Eye Gel
products.skin: All skin types; targets darkness and laxity
products.how: Pat a small amount around the eye area morning and night.
products.desc: A cooling gel for the eye area built around vitamin C and peptides. The pick when dark circles and early laxity are the concern rather than dryness.

products.name: C Eye Serum Advance+
products.skin: All skin types, dullness around the eyes
products.how: Apply 1-2 drops to the palm, then dab and smooth around the brow bone and under-eye area.
products.desc: A concentrated vitamin C serum sized for the eye area, for people who want the brightening of Pro-Heal or Super Serum in a formula built for the thinner skin around the eyes.

products.name: Body Complex
products.skin: Excellent for compromised or very dry skin
products.how: Apply generously to body skin, ideally right after a bath or shower while skin is still damp.
products.desc: A body lotion built to the same clinical standard as the facial line, for skin that needs real barrier support rather than a scented afterthought.

products.name: Youth Body Serum
products.how: Spray or smooth onto body skin as needed for a lightweight hydration boost.
products.desc: A lightweight body serum mist for humid climates or gym bags — full hydration without the heaviness of a body butter.

products.name: Sheald Recovery Balm
products.skin: Post-procedure, compromised or very dry skin
products.how: Apply a generous layer over compromised or freshly treated skin as often as needed for comfort.
products.desc: The balm clinics reach for after lasers, peels and microneedling. Forms a breathable protective layer over compromised skin and keeps it comfortable while it repairs. Equally good on winter-cracked hands and lips.
